text: District Project: Varanasi — Kashi Vishwanath Corridor. ₹339 crore. PM Modi's constituency project. Temple-Ganga link. 40+ ancient temples restored. Tourist amenities, museum, shopping complex. 7 crore visitors since inauguration.

District Project: Ayodhya — Ram Mandir and Township. Temple cost: ₹1,800 crore. Airport: Maharishi Valmiki (₹1,450 cr). Railway station modernization. 25 km Ring Road. Tourism infrastructure for 1 lakh daily visitors projected.
District Project: Lucknow Metro Phase 1. ₹6,928 crore. 23 km North-South corridor. CCS Airport to Munshipulia. 21 stations. Daily ridership: 1.5 lakh. Phase 2 (11 km East-West) under planning.
District Project: Jaipur Metro Phase 1B. ₹2,500 crore. Chandpole to Badi Chaupar extension. Pink Line connecting key tourist areas. Phase 2 proposal for Sitapura to Ambabari.

District Project: Indore Super Corridor. ₹3,000 crore. 25 km IT/business corridor. TCS, Infosys, WNS offices. 50,000+ IT jobs created. IIM Indore and IIT Indore nearby. Integrated township development.

District Project: Muzaffarpur — Flood protection embankments (₹300 cr) and Litchi Processing Centre (₹150 cr). Gandak embankment strengthening. Cold chain for Shahi Litchi preservation. Target: reduce flood damage and increase farmer income.
